case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS THE PHOEBUS COMPANY, INC

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THE PHOEBUS COMPANY, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
